testcase.classname: checkHealth returns health data on success
testcase.name: checkHealth returns health data on success

testcase.classname: checkHealth logs and re-throws error on failure
testcase.name: checkHealth logs and re-throws error on failure

testcase.classname: decodeJWT returns null for falsy input
testcase.name: decodeJWT returns null for falsy input

testcase.classname: decodeJWT returns null for a token with wrong number of parts
testcase.name: decodeJWT returns null for a token with wrong number of parts

testcase.classname: decodeJWT decodes a valid JWT and returns its payload
testcase.name: decodeJWT decodes a valid JWT and returns its payload

testcase.classname: decodeJWT returns null for a token with malformed base64 payload
testcase.name: decodeJWT returns null for a token with malformed base64 payload

testcase.classname: decodeJWT handles tokens with URL-safe base64 encoding (- and _ characters)
testcase.name: decodeJWT handles tokens with URL-safe base64 encoding (- and _ characters)

testcase.classname: extractUserFromToken returns null for a falsy token
testcase.name: extractUserFromToken returns null for a falsy token

testcase.classname: extractUserFromToken returns null for an invalid token
testcase.name: extractUserFromToken returns null for an invalid token

testcase.classname: extractUserFromToken extracts user data from standard JWT claims
testcase.name: extractUserFromToken extracts user data from standard JWT claims

testcase.classname: extractUserFromToken falls back to .NET-style claim names when standard claims are missing
testcase.name: extractUserFromToken falls back to .NET-style claim names when standard claims are missing

testcase.classname: extractUserFromToken returns null values for missing claims
testcase.name: extractUserFromToken returns null values for missing claims

testcase.classname: isJWTExpired returns true for a falsy token
testcase.name: isJWTExpired returns true for a falsy token

testcase.classname: isJWTExpired returns true for a token without exp claim
testcase.name: isJWTExpired returns true for a token without exp claim

testcase.classname: isJWTExpired returns true for an expired token
testcase.name: isJWTExpired returns true for an expired token

testcase.classname: isJWTExpired returns false for a token that has not yet expired
testcase.name: isJWTExpired returns false for a token that has not yet expired

testcase.classname: isJWTExpired returns true for an invalid token
testcase.name: isJWTExpired returns true for an invalid token

testcase.classname: generateBackup downloads the backup file and returns success
testcase.name: generateBackup downloads the backup file and returns success

testcase.classname: generateBackup uses the filename from content-disposition header
testcase.name: generateBackup uses the filename from content-disposition header

testcase.classname: generateBackup falls back to default filename when content-disposition is missing
testcase.name: generateBackup falls back to default filename when content-disposition is missing

testcase.classname: generateBackup falls back to default filename when content-disposition has no filename match
testcase.name: generateBackup falls back to default filename when content-disposition has no filename match

testcase.classname: generateBackup returns error on API failure
testcase.name: generateBackup returns error on API failure

testcase.classname: generateBackup falls back to error.message when response has no error field
testcase.name: generateBackup falls back to error.message when response has no error field

testcase.name: getBackupStatus returns success with status data

testcase.classname: getBackupStatus returns error on failure
testcase.name: getBackupStatus returns error on failure

testcase.classname: getBackupStatus falls back to default message when error is empty
testcase.name: getBackupStatus falls back to default message when error is empty

testcase.name: getStats returns success with dashboard stats

testcase.name: getStats falls back to error.message when response has no error field

testcase.classname: sanitizeHtml returns empty string for non-string input

testcase.classname: sanitizeHtml passes through plain text unchanged
testcase.name: sanitizeHtml passes through plain text unchanged

testcase.classname: sanitizeHtml encodes HTML angle brackets

testcase.classname: sanitizeHtml handles ampersands

testcase.classname: sanitizeString returns empty string for null
testcase.name: sanitizeString returns empty string for null

testcase.classname: sanitizeString returns empty string for non-string
testcase.name: sanitizeString returns empty string for non-string

testcase.classname: sanitizeString trims leading/trailing whitespace
testcase.name: sanitizeString trims leading/trailing whitespace

testcase.classname: sanitizeString strips HTML tags
testcase.name: sanitizeString strips HTML tags

testcase.classname: sanitizeString removes control characters (except tab/newline)
testcase.name: sanitizeString removes control characters (except tab/newline)

testcase.classname: sanitizeString keeps tab characters
testcase.name: sanitizeString keeps tab characters

testcase.classname: sanitizeString keeps newline characters
testcase.name: sanitizeString keeps newline characters

testcase.classname: sanitizeString returns clean plain text unchanged
testcase.name: sanitizeString returns clean plain text unchanged

testcase.classname: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for null
testcase.name: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for null

testcase.classname: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for non-string
testcase.name: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for non-string

testcase.classname: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for invalid email
testcase.name: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for invalid email

testcase.classname: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for email missing domain
testcase.name: sanitizeEmail returns empty string for email missing domain

testcase.classname: sanitizeEmail returns normalised lowercase for valid email
testcase.name: sanitizeEmail returns normalised lowercase for valid email

testcase.classname: sanitizeEmail accepts standard email format
testcase.name: sanitizeEmail accepts standard email format

testcase.classname: sanitizePhoneNumber returns empty string for null
testcase.name: sanitizePhoneNumber returns empty string for null

testcase.classname: sanitizePhoneNumber removes non-digit characters
testcase.name: sanitizePhoneNumber removes non-digit characters

testcase.classname: sanitizePhoneNumber leaves digits untouched
testcase.name: sanitizePhoneNumber leaves digits untouched

testcase.classname: sanitizePhoneNumber handles empty string
testcase.name: sanitizePhoneNumber handles empty string

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber parses a valid number string
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber parses a valid number string

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber returns min for NaN input
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber returns min for NaN input

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber clamps to min when value is below range
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber clamps to min when value is below range

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber clamps to max when value exceeds range
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber clamps to max when value exceeds range

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber returns value when within range
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber returns value when within range

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber handles numeric input directly
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber handles numeric input directly

testcase.classname: sanitizeNumber uses 0 as default min
testcase.name: sanitizeNumber uses 0 as default min

testcase.name: containsSuspiciousPatterns returns false for null

testcase.name: containsSuspiciousPatterns returns false for non-string

testcase.classname: containsSuspiciousPatterns returns false for clean text

testcase.name: useApi sets error state and re-throws on failure

testcase.name: ALLOWED_KEYS exports the expected key constants

testcase.classname: isAllowedKey returns true for allowed keys
testcase.name: isAllowedKey returns true for allowed keys

testcase.classname: isAllowedKey returns false for unknown keys
testcase.name: isAllowedKey returns false for unknown keys

testcase.classname: setItem / getItem stores and retrieves a value for an allowed key
testcase.name: setItem / getItem stores and retrieves a value for an allowed key

testcase.classname: setItem / getItem returns false and logs error when key is not allowed
testcase.name: setItem / getItem returns false and logs error when key is not allowed

testcase.classname: setItem / getItem returns null and logs error when getting a disallowed key
testcase.name: setItem / getItem returns null and logs error when getting a disallowed key

testcase.classname: setItem / getItem returns null when key is allowed but not yet set
testcase.name: setItem / getItem returns null when key is allowed but not yet set

testcase.classname: setItem / getItem strips HTML tags from stored values (XSS prevention)
testcase.name: setItem / getItem strips HTML tags from stored values (XSS prevention)

testcase.classname: removeItem removes an existing allowed key and returns true
testcase.name: removeItem removes an existing allowed key and returns true

testcase.classname: removeItem returns false and logs error for a disallowed key
testcase.name: removeItem returns false and logs error for a disallowed key

testcase.classname: clear removes all allowed keys from storage
testcase.name: clear removes all allowed keys from storage

testcase.classname: auth token helpers setAuthToken stores and getAuthToken retrieves the token
testcase.name: auth token helpers setAuthToken stores and getAuthToken retrieves the token

testcase.classname: auth token helpers setRefreshToken stores and getRefreshToken retrieves the token
testcase.name: auth token helpers setRefreshToken stores and getRefreshToken retrieves the token

testcase.classname: auth token helpers setTokenExpiry stores and getTokenExpiry retrieves the expiry
testcase.name: auth token helpers setTokenExpiry stores and getTokenExpiry retrieves the expiry

testcase.classname: isTokenExpired returns false when no expiry is stored
testcase.name: isTokenExpired returns false when no expiry is stored

testcase.classname: isTokenExpired returns true when the expiry date is in the past
testcase.name: isTokenExpired returns true when the expiry date is in the past

testcase.classname: isTokenExpired returns false when the expiry date is in the future
testcase.name: isTokenExpired returns false when the expiry date is in the future

testcase.classname: clearAuth removes auth_token, refresh_token, and token_expiry
testcase.name: clearAuth removes auth_token, refresh_token, and token_expiry

testcase.classname: cleanupOldData removes unauthorized keys that were placed in localStorage externally
testcase.name: cleanupOldData removes unauthorized keys that were placed in localStorage externally

testsuite.name: AuthProvider – initial state with no stored token

testcase.classname: AuthProvider – initial state with no stored token starts with user=null, token=null, loading=false after mount
testcase.name: AuthProvider – initial state with no stored token starts with user=null, token=null, loading=false after mount

testcase.classname: AuthProvider – initial state with valid stored token restores user from a valid, non-expired stored token
testcase.name: AuthProvider – initial state with valid stored token restores user from a valid, non-expired stored token

testcase.classname: AuthProvider – initial state with expired token clears auth and sets user=null when stored token is expired
testcase.name: AuthProvider – initial state with expired token clears auth and sets user=null when stored token is expired

testcase.classname: AuthProvider – initial state when extractUserFromToken returns null clears auth when token is valid but user extraction fails
testcase.name: AuthProvider – initial state when extractUserFromToken returns null clears auth when token is valid but user extraction fails

testcase.classname: login() sets user and token, persists auth token to storage
testcase.name: login() sets user and token, persists auth token to storage

testcase.classname: login() does not call setTokenExpiry when expiresAt is omitted
testcase.name: login() does not call setTokenExpiry when expiresAt is omitted

testcase.classname: logout() clears user, token, and calls clearAuth
testcase.name: logout() clears user, token, and calls clearAuth

testcase.classname: isAuthenticated() returns false when not logged in
testcase.name: isAuthenticated() returns false when not logged in

testcase.classname: isAuthenticated() returns true after a successful login
testcase.name: isAuthenticated() returns true after a successful login

testcase.classname: useAuth – error outside provider throws when used outside of AuthProvider
testcase.name: useAuth – error outside provider throws when used outside of AuthProvider

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should initialize with default values
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should initialize with default values

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate monthly payment correctly using French amortization formula
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate monthly payment correctly using French amortization formula

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct monthly payment for 100,000 at 18% for 3 years
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct monthly payment for 100,000 at 18% for 3 years

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct total payment and interest
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate correct total payment and interest

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should calculate max financing based on 35% of monthly income
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should calculate max financing based on 35% of monthly income

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should respect credit type max amount limit
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should respect credit type max amount limit

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should use correct interest rate from credit type
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should use correct interest rate from credit type

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should handle zero interest rate edge case
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should handle zero interest rate edge case

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should recalculate when term changes
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should recalculate when term changes

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should ensure monthly payment is a positive number
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should ensure monthly payment is a positive number

testcase.classname: useCreditCalculator should handle loading state correctly
testcase.name: useCreditCalculator should handle loading state correctly

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should render the wizard with initial step (personal data)

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when fullName is empty
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when fullName is empty

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when email is empty
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when email is empty

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate email format
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate email format

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when phone is empty
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should show error when phone is empty

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should advance to step 2 when personal data is valid
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should advance to step 2 when personal data is valid

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate positive monthly salary
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should validate positive monthly salary

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should call onClose when clicking cancel and user confirms
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should call onClose when clicking cancel and user confirms

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should not call onClose when clicking cancel if user cancels confirmation
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should not call onClose when clicking cancel if user cancels confirmation

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should allow navigation back to previous step
testcase.name: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should allow navigation back to previous step

testcase.classname: CreditRequestWizard - Form Validations should submit form successfully when all data is valid
